documents:
AMAZON INDIA CALLBACK BOOKING RULES
Last Updated: May 2026

1. BOOKING SCHEDULING
- Callback Option: Customers can request a call from an agent through the contact center.
- Availability: Callbacks are scheduled between 8:00 AM and 8:00 PM.
- Agent Verification: The agent will call the registered phone number. If the call is missed, the agent will attempt two more times at 15-minute intervals. If all fail, the ticket is set to pending and the customer must reschedule.

AMAZON INDIA CANCELLATION POLICY — PRE-DISPATCH GUIDELINES
Last Updated: May 2026

1. CANCELLATION TIMEFRAME
Customers can cancel items or orders before they enter the shipping process.
- If the order has not been dispatched, cancellation is free and instant, and refunds are initiated immediately.
- Once the package is dispatched, the order cannot be cancelled directly from the app. Customers must refuse delivery when the ATS courier agent attempts drop-off. Once delivery is refused, the package returns to the center and a refund is triggered.
AMAZON INDIA COMPLAINT REGISTRATION AND RETURN POLICY Last Updated: May 2026

1. COMPLAINT REGISTRATION
When a customer reports an issue that cannot be resolved immediately (e.g., damaged items, lost packages, payment disputes), the customer support system registers a formal complaint. - A unique support Ticket ID (format: TKT-XXXXXXXX) is generated automatically. - High Priority: Assigned to urgent issues like payment failed but money deducted, delivery delays of more than 5 days, or account lockouts. High priority tickets require supervisor review and are resolved within 2-4 hours.

than 5 days, or account lockouts. High priority tickets require supervisor review and are resolved within 2-4 hours. - Medium Priority: Assigned to return pick-up failures, Prime billing queries, or wrong item complaints. These are resolved within 24-48 hours.

2. RETURN WINDOWS AND REPLACEMENTS
Different product categories on Amazon India have specific return and replacement windows:
- Electronics & Mobiles: Most electronics, laptops, tablets, and smartphones have a 10-day return window. The policy is usually "Replacement Only". If the product is defective, a free replacement of the same model will be shipped. A refund is issued ONLY if the item is out of stock. - Fashion & Clothing: Apparels, shoes, and fashion accessories have a 30-day return window. Customers can request a size exchange, replacement, or a full refund.

Clothing: Apparels, shoes, and fashion accessories have a 30-day return window. Customers can request a size exchange, replacement, or a full refund. - Home & Kitchen Appliances: Have a 10-day return window. Eligible for free replacement if damaged in transit or defective. - Non-Returnable Items: Grocery, beauty products, personal care appliances, and software are non-returnable. If damaged, a refund can be authorized by support agents on a case-by-case basis.

3. WRONG OR DAMAGED ITEM PROCESS
If a wrong product is delivered (e.g., received a phone cover instead of a phone) or the product is physically damaged:
- Take photos/videos of the package and item as proof. - Do not throw away the original box or outer packaging. - Register a complaint within 10 days of delivery. - Amazon India will dispatch a return pickup agent. The pickup agent will verify the physical condition of the item and match the serial number/IMEI before accepting the return. Once picked up, a replacement or refund is triggered.

physical condition of the item and match the serial number/IMEI before accepting the return. Once picked up, a replacement or refund is triggered. - For high-value electronics (above ₹20,000), support agents may require an internal investigation (takes 3-5 business days) before approving the refund or replacement.

AMAZON INDIA CUSTOMER VERIFICATION RULES
Last Updated: May 2026

1. SECURITY CHECKS BEFORE ACCOUNT CHANGES
To prevent unauthorized access and data breaches, support agents must verify the caller:
- Required Info: Caller's full name, registered email address, or phone number.
- Transaction Verification: For order details, the customer must confirm the last 4 digits of the card used, or the order date and item name.
- OTP Verification: A One-Time Password (OTP) is sent to the registered mobile for high-risk changes (e.g., email or shipping address update).

AMAZON INDIA DAMAGED PRODUCT POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026

1. REPORTING DAMAGE IN TRANSIT
- Timeframe: Physical damage discovered post-delivery must be reported within 10 days of package delivery.
- Evidence Requirements: For high-value goods (mobiles, laptops, TVs), customers must provide photos of the damaged item and the shipping label on the package box. Unboxing videos are recommended but not mandatory unless fraud is suspected.
- Free Replacement: Amazon India processes a replacement once the damage is verified.

AMAZON INDIA DELIVERY DELAY POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026

1. UNEXPECTED TRANSIT DELAYS
Occasionally, ATS shipments experience delays due to regional logistics, weather disruptions, or high volume.
- Auto-Notification: The estimated delivery date is revised automatically in the tracking details.
- Shipping Fee Refund: If a guaranteed delivery date is missed for a paid shipping order, the delivery fee is refunded to the customer's account.
- Compensation Voucher: For Prime delivery delays exceeding 48 hours, support agents may issue a ₹50 promotional credit voucher as a goodwill gesture.

AMAZON INDIA DELIVERY EXCEPTION POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026 1. EXCEPTION CATEGORIES
ATS delivery agents face exceptions like:
- Customer Unavailable: Agent makes 3 delivery attempts on consecutive days.
- Incorrect Address: The customer is contacted via phone to update coordinates.
- Gate Security Restriction: Packages can be left with society guards or at the reception desk with the customer's prior SMS permission.
AMAZON INDIA SHIPPING AND DELIVERY POLICY — OFFICIAL CUSTOMER SUPPORT REFERENCE Last Updated: May 2026

1. DELIVERY SPEEDS AND SHIPPING FEES
Amazon India offers several shipping speeds. Eligible pin codes receive:
- One-Day Delivery: Free for Amazon Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹150 per order. - Two-Day Delivery: Free for Amazon Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹120 per order. - Same-Day Delivery: Free for Prime members in selected metro cities for orders above ₹499. For non-Prime members, Same-Day delivery costs ₹175. - Standard Delivery: Delivers within 2-4 business days. Free for Prime members.

For non-Prime members, Same-Day delivery costs ₹175. - Standard Delivery: Delivers within 2-4 business days. Free for Prime members. Non-Prime members get free standard shipping on orders of ₹499 or more; otherwise, a flat ₹40 shipping fee applies.

2. LOGISTICS AND CARRIERS
Amazon India orders are primarily fulfilled via ATS (Amazon Transportation Services), our in-house courier partner. We also partner with premium third-party courier services such as Blue Dart, Delhivery, DTDC, and Ecom Express to ensure coverage across over 19,000 pin codes. The assigned courier and tracking number (e.g., ATS87564120, BD11993425) are shared via SMS and the Amazon.in order tracking dashboard immediately upon package dispatch.

3. LOGISTICAL AND DELIVERY DELAYS
Occasionally, shipments may experience delays due to unforeseen logistics issues, extreme weather conditions, or local disruptions. In such cases, the expected delivery date will automatically update on the customer's portal. If a package does not arrive by the revised expected date, customers are advised to wait for 24-48 hours. If the delay exceeds 3 business days beyond the original window, customers can request supervisor escalation or initiate a refund.

4. DELIVERED BUT NOT RECEIVED ISSUES
If an order's status is marked as "Delivered" on the tracking portal but the customer has not received the package:
- Check with family members, security personnel at the apartment gate, or neighbors who might have accepted the delivery. - Verify if a secure drop-off photo was uploaded by the ATS delivery agent. - Allow 24 hours as couriers sometimes scan packages as delivered prematurely.

by the ATS delivery agent. - Allow 24 hours as couriers sometimes scan packages as delivered prematurely. - If the package is still missing after 24 hours, the customer must report it to Amazon support within 30 days of the marked delivery date to qualify for a free replacement or refund.

5. PACKAGE DAMAGED IN TRANSIT
If a shipment is visibly damaged upon delivery, customers can refuse to accept it. The ATS delivery agent will return the package to the fulfillment center, and a replacement or full refund will be processed automatically. If the damage is discovered after opening the box, please refer to the Amazon India return window and file a complaint within 10 days of delivery.

AMAZON INDIA SUPPORT RESOLUTION LEVELS
Last Updated: May 2026 1. TIMELINES BY LEVEL
- Level 1 (Customer Support Agent): Real-time chat/voice help. Resolves 85% of cases.
- Level 2 (Shift Supervisor): Escalation response within 30 minutes. Resolves complex return/refund cases.
- Level 3 (Grievance Officer): Resolves severe legal, policy, and account disputes in 3-5 business days.

AMAZON INDIA SUPPORT ESCALATION POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026

1. SUPPORT ESCALATION TIERS
- Tier 1 Support: General customer care agents. Handles FAQs, refunds, tracking, and cancellations.
- Tier 2 Supervisor: Escalate when a customer is highly frustrated, demands supervisor assistance, or has an unresolved payment dispute. Reaches back in 30 minutes.
- Tier 3 Grievance Desk: Reserved for legal, safety, or severe customer disputes. Resolution takes 3-5 business days.
AMAZON INDIA FAQ & SUPPORT PROCEDURES — OFFICIAL REFERENCE Last Updated: May 2026

1. AMAZON PRIME MEMBERSHIP
Amazon Prime is a premium subscription program offering benefits to customers in India:
- Free delivery: Free One-Day, Two-Day, and Standard Delivery on eligible items. No minimum order value required. - Prime Video & Prime Music: Unlimited ad-free music streaming and access to exclusive movies, TV shows, and Amazon Originals. - Prime Reading: Free access to a curated selection of eBooks. - Early Access: 24-hour early access to major sale events like Prime Day, Great Indian Festival, and Lightning Deals.

of eBooks. - Early Access: 24-hour early access to major sale events like Prime Day, Great Indian Festival, and Lightning Deals. - Prime Pricing: Subscription costs ₹1,499 for 1 year, ₹599 for 3 months, or ₹299 for 1 month.

2. PAYMENT FAILURES AND DOUBLE CHARGES
If money is deducted from your bank account but the order is not placed (marked as "Payment Failed"):
- Do not panic. The money is held in a bank transit pool and is completely safe. - UPI / Net Banking: Refund is initiated automatically and will revert to the original bank account within 3 to 5 business days. - Credit / Debit Card: Reversal occurs automatically within 5 to 7 business days. - Customers can check the refund status directly in the Amazon Pay dashboard under "Transactions".

occurs automatically within 5 to 7 business days. - Customers can check the refund status directly in the Amazon Pay dashboard under "Transactions". If the reversal is delayed, customer support can issue a Bank Reference Number (ARN/RRN) to trace the transaction with your bank.

3. TAX INVOICE AND WARRANTY CLAIMS
To claim warranty on any product purchased from Amazon India:
- Go to "Your Orders" on the Amazon app/website.
- Locate the specific product and click on "Download Invoice". Select "Tax Invoice" to download the PDF.
- Print the tax invoice and take it along with the product to any brand-authorized service center. The invoice serves as official proof of purchase and warranty start date.
- Note: Amazon India does not directly issue warranty cards. The invoice is sufficient for brand service centers across India.

AMAZON INDIA FRAUD DETECTION AND RISK MANAGEMENT
Last Updated: May 2026

1. PREVENTING FRAUDULENT TRANSACTIONS
- Address Verification: System flags accounts ordering high-value products to unverified addresses.
- COD Limitations: Cash on Delivery is disabled for accounts with a high return-to-origin (RTO) rate.
- Order Cancellation: Suspicious orders are placed on hold for 24 hours. Customers must upload identity proof or the order is automatically cancelled.

AMAZON INDIA LATE REFUND INVESTIGATION
Last Updated: May 2026

1. BANK DELAYS AND INVESTIGATION
If a refund is processed by Amazon but not received in the customer's bank within 5 business days:
- Acquirer Reference Number (ARN): Amazon support provides an ARN code.
- Bank Tracking: The customer can share the ARN with their bank branch to trace the credit.
- Bank Hold: Often banks place refunds in a temporary settlement pool; the ARN resolves this.

AMAZON INDIA LOST PACKAGE IN TRANSIT POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026 1. DEFINING LOST PACKAGES
A package is declared lost in transit if:
- Tracking shows no movement or updates for more than 5 consecutive business days.
- The estimated delivery date has passed by more than 48 hours and the package is untraceable.
- Support action: Support agents will trigger a full refund or a free replacement immediately.

AMAZON INDIA PAYMENT FAILURE POLICY — DOUBLE DEDUCTION HELP
Last Updated: May 2026

1. FAILED TRANSACTIONS AND DEDUCTIONS
If a payment fails during checkout but the customer's bank account or credit card is charged:
- Automatic Refund: The payment gateway detects the failed order and initiates a reversal.
- Timelines: Reversals occur within 24-48 hours for UPI, and 3-5 business days for banks.
- Support Verification: Customers are requested to wait 24 hours. Support agents do not create refund tickets for failed orders until the transaction status is finalized.
AMAZON INDIA PAYMENT POLICY — OFFICIAL REFERENCE Last Updated: May 2026

1. ACCEPTED PAYMENT METHODS
Amazon India offers multiple convenient payment options during checkout:
- Amazon Pay UPI: Customers can link their bank account and pay instantly using a UPI PIN. No transactional charges apply. - Credit / Debit Cards: We accept Visa, Mastercard, RuPay, and American Express. - Net Banking: Supported for all major banks in India. - Cash on Delivery (COD): Available for order values up to ₹49,999. A convenience fee of ₹40 may apply for COD orders below ₹499. Payment can be made in cash, or digitally via UPI scan-and-pay at the door.

of ₹40 may apply for COD orders below ₹499. Payment can be made in cash, or digitally via UPI scan-and-pay at the door. - Amazon Pay Balance: Pre-loaded money in the digital wallet. Quickest checkout method.

2. EQUATED MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS (EMI)
For high-value purchases, Amazon India offers No Cost EMI and standard EMI options:
- No Cost EMI: Available on selected credit cards, Amazon Pay Late, and select debit cards. The interest charged by the bank is given as an upfront discount, making the effective interest rate 0%. - Standard EMI: Available for periods of 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, and 24 months, with interest rates varying from 13% to 16% per annum depending on the bank. - Cancellation and EMI Refund: If an order placed on EMI is cancelled or returned, the purchase amount is refunded to the card.

on the bank. - Cancellation and EMI Refund: If an order placed on EMI is cancelled or returned, the purchase amount is refunded to the card. However, processing fees charged by the bank during the transaction (usually ₹199 + GST) are non-refundable.

3. UPI DISPUTES AND REFUNDS
In case of a failed payment where the bank reports a successful transaction but Amazon shows a failure:
- The payment status is updated automatically within 24 hours.
- If not updated, the transaction is marked as a dispute. A refund is processed back to the original bank account within 2-4 business days.
- If a customer disputes a transaction, they should share their UPI Transaction ID (starts with 3 or 4 and is 12 digits long) with Amazon support for tracking.

AMAZON INDIA PRIME MEMBERSHIP POLICY
Last Updated: May 2026 1. FEES AND PLANS
- Monthly Plan: ₹299 per month.
- Annual Plan: ₹1,499 per year.
- Shopping Benefits: Free One-Day, Two-Day, and Same-Day delivery on eligible products.
- Digital Benefits: Unlimited streaming on Prime Video, ad-free music on Prime Music, free eBooks on Prime Reading, and early access (24 hours) to sale events.
AMAZON INDIA REFUND POLICY — OFFICIAL CUSTOMER SUPPORT REFERENCE Last Updated: May 2026

1. REFUND TIMELINES AND METHODS
Once a returned item is received at the Amazon India fulfillment center, a quality check is performed within 24-48 hours. After successful quality inspection, the refund is issued to the customer's selected payment method. The refund credit timelines are:
- Amazon Pay Balance: Processed within 2 hours of inspection approval. - Amazon Pay UPI / Linked Bank Account: Processed within 2 to 4 business days. - Net Banking: Processed within 2 to 4 business days. - Credit Card / Debit Card: Processed within 3 to 5 business days, depending on the issuing bank.

within 2 to 4 business days. - Credit Card / Debit Card: Processed within 3 to 5 business days, depending on the issuing bank. - Cash on Delivery (COD): Refund is credited to the customer's bank account via NEFT (takes 2-4 business days once bank details are updated) or directly as Amazon Pay Balance (takes 2 hours).

2. REFUND OF SHIPPING FEES
If the return is due to an Amazon India error (e.g., wrong item received, defective product, damaged in transit), the entire shipping fee (if any) paid during purchase will be fully refunded. If the return is voluntary (e.g., customer changed mind, size did not fit but product matches description), the original shipping fee of ₹40 is not refundable, and a return pick-up fee may be deducted depending on the product category.

3. AMAZON A-TO-Z GUARANTEE
For purchases made from third-party sellers on the Amazon India Marketplace, customers are protected by the Amazon A-to-z Guarantee. This guarantee covers:
- Orders that are delayed by more than 3 days after the maximum estimated delivery date.
- Items received that are damaged, defective, or materially different from what was described.
- Cases where the seller fails to issue a refund despite receiving the return.
A-to-z Guarantee claims can be submitted up to 90 days after the estimated delivery date, and the maximum claim value is ₹2,500.

4. REFUND STATUS AND FAQS
Customers can check their refund status under "Your Orders" -> "View Return/Refund Status". If a refund is marked as "Refunded" in the Amazon portal but has not reflected in the bank statement, customers should wait for the maximum business day limit of their payment method (up to 5 days for cards) and contact their bank with the refund RRN (Retrieval Reference Number) provided by Amazon support.

AMAZON INDIA REGIONAL DELIVERY RESTRICTIONS
Last Updated: May 2026

1. RESTRICTED DELIVERY AND CODES
- Non-Serviceable PIN Codes: Remote mountainous areas or specific border zones.
- Restricted Goods: Flight transport safety regulations ban liquids, batteries, and aerosols from air shipments to North-East India and Jammu & Kashmir. These must be shipped via surface cargo, extending delivery times by 5-7 days.
- Local Restrictions: Selected PIN codes have restrictions on high-value COD orders.

AMAZON INDIA REPLACEMENT POLICY — DEFECTIVE ITEMS
Last Updated: May 2026

1. REPLACEMENT RULES
If a product arrives damaged, defective, or is not as described, the customer can request a free replacement.
- The replacement item will be shipped at no extra cost using standard shipping.
- The replacement order is initiated only after the original product is successfully picked up or returned.
- If the original product is out of stock, a full refund will be processed to the original payment method instead of a replacement.

AMAZON INDIA RETURN POLICY — CATEGORY GUIDELINES
Last Updated: May 2026

1. PRODUCT CATEGORIES RETURN WINDOWS
Different products have specific return windows on Amazon India:
- Mobiles & Electronics: 10-day return window. Most devices are eligible for replacement only if found defective.
- Apparel & Fashion: 30-day return window. Fully eligible for exchange, size swap, or full refund.
- Home & Kitchen: 10-day return window for appliances and furniture.
- Groceries & Daily Needs: Non-returnable. If damaged, a refund can be issued without returning the item.

2. VERIFICATION CHECKS
When a return agent arrives to collect an item:
- For smartphones, the agent will verify the IMEI and serial numbers match the order.
- The product must be returned with all original tags, accessories, and user manuals.

AMAZON INDIA SHIPPING POLICY — FEES AND SPEEDS
Last Updated: May 2026

1. SHIPPING SPEEDS & COSTS
Eligible Amazon India customers can choose from:
- One-Day Delivery: Free for Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹150.
- Two-Day Delivery: Free for Prime members. Non-Prime members pay ₹120.
- Standard Delivery (2-4 days): Free for Prime members. Non-Prime members get free shipping on orders above ₹499, otherwise pay ₹40.
- Same-Day Delivery: Metro regions only. Free for Prime members for orders above ₹499.
AMAZON INDIA PRODUCT WARRANTY POLICY Last Updated: May 2026

1. BRAND WARRANTY VS SELLER WARRANTY
Most branded products sold on Amazon India (electronics, home appliances, mobile phones) come with a manufacturer or brand warranty:
- Brand Warranty: The warranty is provided and fulfilled directly by the brand (e.g., Samsung, Apple, HP, Sony). The warranty duration is typically 1 year from the date of purchase. For any defects, the customer must contact the brand's authorized service network. - Seller Warranty: For certain imported, unbranded, or refurbished items, the warranty is provided by the seller.

brand's authorized service network. - Seller Warranty: For certain imported, unbranded, or refurbished items, the warranty is provided by the seller. The seller's contact details are listed on the product detail page and invoice. For refurbished items, Amazon Renewed offers a 6-month seller warranty.

2. CLAIMING WARRANTY
To claim warranty on a product purchased from Amazon India, follow these steps:
- Step 1: Download the PDF tax invoice from "Your Orders" -> "Download Invoice" -> "Tax Invoice". - Step 2: Take a printout of the tax invoice. - Step 3: Visit the nearest authorized service center of the brand. The tax invoice contains the purchase date and the unique serial number or IMEI of the device (if applicable), which acts as official warranty proof. - Note: Customers do not need physical warranty cards stamped by the seller.

the device (if applicable), which acts as official warranty proof. - Note: Customers do not need physical warranty cards stamped by the seller. The tax invoice is legally recognized across India as proof of warranty.

3. AMAZON EXTENDED WARRANTY AND PROTECTION PLANS
Amazon India offers optional extended warranty and protection plans (partnered with Acko or OneAssist) for mobiles, laptops, and appliances:
- The plan must be purchased on the same day as the product.
- It covers accidental screen damage, liquid damage, and mechanical breakdowns beyond the brand's 1-year warranty period.
- Claims can be filed directly on the partner portal (Acko/OneAssist) using the plan ID received via email. Amazon support can assist in retrieving plan IDs or routing calls to the partner helpdesk.
